## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences: what sales job this helps with, or what it fixes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 .github/scripts/repo_checks.py` passes locally
- [ ] Every new or changed relative link resolves
- [ ] Any example content is entirely fictional, with no real customer, prospect, employer or confidential data
- [ ] This is one focused change, not a mix of unrelated edits
- [ ] If this adds or changes a workflow or skill, it meets the [nine-point completeness checklist](../CONTRIBUTING.md#when-a-workflow-or-skill-counts-as-complete) in CONTRIBUTING.md, or this PR says plainly what's still missing
- [ ] This is left as a draft, or otherwise open, for review, not merged by me
